INTENT-IR: Deterministic Execution Substrate for AI Agents

Core Idea:
Instead of agents emitting text, they emit INTENT-IR.
Structured, compiled, verified, and replayable.

Architecture:
- High-level Agent IR (JSON)
- Lower-level INTENT-IR instructions
- Compiler (Agent IR -> INTENT-IR)
- Assembler (IR -> Binary)
- Runtime (Interpreter + Tracer)

CLI:
- intentir compile
- intentir asm
- intentir run
- intentir replay

Key Message:
Standardize agent execution via IR to enable safety and observability.
